zh.Kilton, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特吉爾頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de Thweng於大約1281年出生在英國越可爾時，她的父親Marmaduke de Thweng34歲，母親Isabel de Ros6歲。她於1320年之後與Robert Hilton結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1348年在英國越可爾斯文享年68歲。

zh-hans.Kilton, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰薩默塞特吉爾頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret de Thweng于大约1281年出生在英国越可爾时，她的父亲Marmaduke de Thweng34岁，母亲Isabel de Ros6岁。她于1320年之后与Robert Hilton结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1348年在英国越可爾斯文享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thweng
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place so called in East Yorkshire, named with Old Norse thvengr or Old English thweng ‘narrow strip of land’.
History: Martha Thwing (died 1774) is buried in the King's Chapel Burying Ground in Boston MA.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de Thweng was born about 1281, in Yorkshire, England, her father, Marmaduke de Thweng, was 34 and her mother, Isabel de Ros, was 6. She married Robert Hilton after 1320. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in 1348, in Swine, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de Thweng est née environ 1281, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Marmaduke de Thweng, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Ros, avait 6 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Hilton après 1320. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1348, à Swine, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret de Thweng um 1281 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Marmaduke de Thweng 34 und ihre Mutter Isabel de Ros 6. Sie hat nach 1320 Robert Hilton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1348 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Swine, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Thweng è nata il circa 1281 nel Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Marmaduke de Thweng, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Isabel de Ros, aveva 6 anni. Lei sposato Robert Hilton dopo il 1320. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1348, nel Swine, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de Thwengが約1281年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Marmaduke de Thwengは34歳，母Isabel de Rosは6歳であった。1320年以後にRobert Hiltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1348年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスウィンで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Thweng(이)가 대략 1281년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Marmaduke de Thweng(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel de Ros(은)는 6세였다. 그녀는 1320년 이후 Robert Hilton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1348년 영국 요르크실르 스윈에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Kilton, Yorkshire, England: Kilton, Bro an Hañv, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Thweng nasceu aproximadamente 1281, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Marmaduke de Thweng, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Ros, tinha 6 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Hilton após 1320. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1348, em Swine, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de Thweng родилась около 1281 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Marmaduke de Thweng было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Ros, 6. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Hilton после 1320 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1348 г. в местности сваин, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret de Thweng nació aproximadamente 1281, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Marmaduke de Thweng, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Isabel de Ros, tenía 6 años. Se casó con Robert Hilton después de 1320. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1348, en Swine, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años.
